data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp utilizes a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and manage complex tasks efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Containerized services, API gateways, load balancers.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: End-to-end encryption is integrated at the core of communication services to ensure privacy and security.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Protocols
data.description: WhatsApp uses real-time protocols to maintain fast and seamless communication.

data.title: Content Delivery Network
data.description: Leveraging CDNs to efficiently distribute media content globally.
data.technical_spec: CDN providers like Akamai, traffic management systems.

data.title: Distributed Database Systems
data.description: WhatsApp uses distributed databases to manage vast amounts of user data across regions.
